title: Batorese

'''Batorese''' was the language of the [[Blood Carver]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Batorine]].

Batorese was a difficult language to master, as it used sounds, scents and a minimal amount of skin [[Color/Legends|coloration]] to communicate information. This was common and logical for Blood Carvers, but most other species could not understand the language. Even [[Protocol droid/Legends|protocol droids]] had difficulty understanding Batorese, and it was useless for non-Blood Carvers to try to speak it.<ref name="UAA" />

As they had a great difficult trying to make themselves understood, most Blood Carvers also learned to speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]], although they did not commonly learn to [[Aurebesh/Legends|read]] it.<ref name="UAA" />

{{Language-stub}}
